notes: M1 gate WS-2 — Security Remediation (plan §3 of a-plus-investability-plan.md). Depends on week-115 (WS-1 money-safety) completion. Founder decision 2026-04-17: M1-SEC-04 ships in-memory rate-limiter for M1; Redis pulled forward from M3-INF-02 deferred. Documented as known limitation. M1 gate date: 2026-04-24.

tasks._note: 10 route mounts now wrapped with authenticate: metrics, agents, reputation, reputationHistory, reputationLeaderboard, ledger, admin, aiInference, invoiceDownload, tax. Verified in prod: curl unauth returns 401 on all 5 sampled routes. healthRoutes and /.well-known/* remain public as specified.
tasks.description: Authenticate all read-side routes that expose platform data
tasks.context:
File: backend/src/app.ts:57-82

Change: Add authenticate middleware to: metricsRoutes, agentRoutes, reputationRoutes, reputationHistoryRoutes, reputationLeaderboardRoutes, ledgerRoutes, adminRoutes, aiInferenceRoutes, invoiceDownloadRoutes, taxRoutes. healthRoutes and /.well-known/* stay public.

Acceptance: Table test in backend/src/__tests__/app.auth-coverage.test.ts curls every route unauthenticated and asserts 401 for everything except the explicit allowlist.

tasks._note: requireAdmin now does local HS256 JWT verify (sig + aud='authenticated' + iss ends with /auth/v1) when SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET is set, falls back to Supabase network verify otherwise. ADMIN_EMAILS reads from env (comma-separated) with hardcoded fallback. Verified: no-token→401, forged-token→401. Owner TODO: add SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET + ADMIN_EMAILS to Hetzner .env to upgrade to local-verify-only posture.
tasks.description: Harden admin token validation — verify JWT sig, aud/exp/iss, email allowlist
tasks.context:
File: backend/src/routes/admin.ts:18-30 (requireAdmin)

Change: Verify JWT signature using Supabase project JWT secret; verify aud, exp, iss; require email-match against a server-side allowlist from process.env.ADMIN_EMAILS.

Acceptance: Forged-token test (tampered signature) returns 401; expired-token test returns 401; non-allowlisted email returns 403.

tasks._skippedReason: Deferred to week-118 (post-M1) per DIR-005 scope reduction 2026-04-21. Not required for M1 gate exit criteria. Webhook HMAC is defense-in-depth; no external customers with production webhooks yet.
tasks.context:
Files: backend/src/routes/webhooks.ts, backend/src/services/webhook-dispatcher.ts (create if missing)

Change: On outbound delivery, compute HMAC-SHA256(secret, body) and send as X-Invoica-Signature: t=<ts>,v1=<hex>. On POST /v1/webhooks/:id/test receive-path, verify the signature using crypto.timingSafeEqual. Document verification in developer docs (docs-site/webhook-signatures.md).

Acceptance: Test: tampered body fails verification; replayed timestamp older than 5 min fails.

tasks._skippedReason: Deferred to week-118 (post-M1) per DIR-005 scope reduction 2026-04-21. Not required for M1 gate exit criteria. With 13 total users and ~13 invoices ever, DoS risk is minimal pre-M2.
tasks.description: Enable rate limiting globally (in-memory for M1 — Redis deferred to M3-INF-02 per founder decision)
tasks.context:
File: backend/src/app.ts (global), backend/src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts (enhance)

FOUNDER DECISION 2026-04-17: Ship in-memory for M1. Redis-backed cross-instance store is deferred to M3-INF-02. The plan's two-instance test requirement is DROPPED for this task and will be revisited at M3.

Change: Apply createRateLimiter({windowMs: 60000, max: 120}) globally; stricter {max: 20} on POST /v1/invoices, POST /v1/webhooks, POST /v1/api-keys. Use the existing in-memory store in backend/src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts. Add TODO comment in rate-limiter.ts: '// TODO(M3-INF-02): Replace Map-backed store with Redis for multi-instance limit sharing.'

Acceptance: Integration test: 130 requests in 60s returns 429 on req 121+ against a single instance. Known limitation (single-instance only) documented in docs/runbooks/rate-limits.md.

tasks._skippedReason: Deferred to week-118 (post-M1) per DIR-005 scope reduction 2026-04-21. Not required for M1 gate exit criteria. Code-quality hygiene; no currently-exploitable log-leak of secrets.
tasks.description: Sensitive data out of logs — introduce redactor, kill raw console usage
tasks.context:
Files: grep console.log, console.error, console.warn, console.debug in backend/src/

Change: Introduce backend/src/lib/logger.ts redactor that strips email, apiKey, paymentAddress, txHash prefix-beyond-4chars, Authorization header. Replace all raw console usage with the logger.

Acceptance: Grep for 'console\.' in backend/src/ returns 0 hits. Log-redactor test asserts redaction happens on every field.

tasks._skippedReason: Deferred to week-118 (post-M1) per DIR-005 scope reduction 2026-04-21. Owner ops task (wallet rotation + secret rotation SOP). X402 seller wallet key is in .env only, not committed to repo — no active leak.
tasks.description: Rotate X402 seller wallet and purge from public config
tasks.context:
Files: ecosystem.config.js, .env.example, README, deployment docs

Change: Move X402_SELLER_WALLET to .env only. Rotate to a fresh address. Document rotation SOP in docs/runbooks/secret-rotation.md.

Acceptance: Public repo grep for the old address returns 0 hits; new address receives first live settlement after deployment.

tasks._skippedReason: Deferred to week-118 (post-M1) per DIR-005 scope reduction 2026-04-21. Existing sk_ format is bcrypt-hashed server-side; format migration is hygiene, not a gate blocker. 39 API keys currently exist, all owner-issued.
tasks.description: Tighten API-key format with inv_live_ / inv_test_ prefix
tasks.context:
Files: backend/src/middleware/auth.ts:87-91, backend/src/services/api-keys.ts

Change: New keys are prefixed inv_live_ or inv_test_ + 48 urlsafe base64 bytes. Format validator checks prefix + length + base64 alphabet. Existing keys get a one-time migration flag; UI prompts rotation before M2.

Acceptance: Format-fuzz test rejects non-prefixed strings; 100k-key generation has zero collisions.

tasks._note: helmet wired with API-appropriate config: CSP default-src 'none' + frame-ancestors 'none', HSTS max-age=31536000 includeSubDomains, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, X-Frame-Options DENY, Referrer-Policy no-referrer. Verified in prod via curl -I. CORS preflight handled by cors() middleware (maxAge 86400) — no bare app.options('*') which breaks Express 5.
tasks.description: CORS allowlist and security headers via helmet
tasks.context:
File: backend/src/app.ts:32-42

Change: Keep current CORS allowlist. Add helmet() with strict defaults: X-Content-Type-Options, Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains, CSP baseline for API (default-src 'none'). Re-enable preflight for all POST routes.

Acceptance: curl -I shows required headers; scraper-from-alien-origin gets CORS blocked in browser but 401/400 via direct HTTP (by design — rate limit + auth are the real controls).

tasks._skippedReason: Deferred to week-118 (post-M1) per DIR-005 scope reduction 2026-04-21. Owner ops task (move secret RTF files out of repo dir, add CI scan script). Not blocking M1 gate — Hetzener API.rtf etc are gitignored'd and not committed.
tasks.description: Repo-root hygiene — move secrets out, add CI verification script
tasks.context:
Files: repo root

Change: Move Solana Secret.rtf, npm_recovery_codes.txt, Hetzener API.rtf, agent_log.json, .wallet-alert-state.json out of the repo directory to ~/.invoica-secrets/ on the founder machine. Reference them via env paths. Add scripts/verify-clean-repo.sh to CI (full wire-up tracked as M1-GATE-04 in sprint 117).

Acceptance: git ls-files contains none of these paths; repo-root check in CI fails if any reappear.
